title: Smoky Roasted Tunisian Pepper Kebabs
description: A vibrant, umami-packed kebab featuring smoky roasted peppers and aromatic herbs, perfect for a Mediterranean-friendly feast.
instructions: Preheat oven to 200 °C (400 °F) and line a baking sheet with parchment.
Cut the peppers into 2 cm pieces and slice the onion into rings.
Whisk olive oil, smoked paprika, cumin, lemon zest, salt, and pepper in a bowl; toss peppers and onion in the mixture.
Thread pepper and onion pieces onto soaked skewers, alternating colors.
Bake skewers on the prepared sheet for 15–18 minutes, turning halfway, until peppers are charred and softened.
While baking, mix chopped coriander with a splash of olive oil for a fresh garnish.
Remove kebabs from the oven and let rest for 2 minutes.
Drizzle with the herb garnish and squeeze fresh lemon juice over the top.
Serve immediately over couscous or with warm flatbread.
Optional: sprinkle crumbled feta or drizzle harissa for added heat.
